title: Barkhausia nana
intro: Barkhausia nana, also known as the Dwarf Barkhausia or Dwarf Yellow-flowered Barkhausia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Menispermaceae. The health benefits of Barkhausia nana include its potential use as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever and other diseases. The bioactive constituents of Barkhausia nana include lignans, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Barkhausia nana include decoctions and infusions, which are traditionally used in various cultures to treat fever and other ailments.
